explanation: Issue explicitly describes fixing an infinite recursion bug and states it's a backport. Both labels are directly stated in the title and body.
Issue requests adding FILTER_EXPRESSION support to RetrievalAugmentationAdvisor, which is clearly an enhancement to RAG functionality with metadata filtering capabilities.
Issue title explicitly mentions 'Observability' and the comprehensive proposal focuses on implementing observability features for Spring AI models.
Issue reports a specific bug with Bedrock model tool calling when using Suppliers vs Functions in streaming mode. All labels are explicitly mentioned in the description.
Issue reports a bug where streaming metrics are not being captured correctly, specifically mentioning the 'spring.ai.chat.client.stream' metric.
Issue describes a bug with MCP (Model Context Protocol) server configuration where POST requests fail with 404 errors. Both the bug nature and MCP context are explicitly stated.
